query: INSERT INTO tours (title, description, departureCountry, departureCity, destinationCountry, destinationCity, duration, price, isAutoGenerated, sourceUrl, createdBy) VALUES ('【柬埔寨雙城奇遇】金邊吳哥五日經典之旅', '深度探索柬埔寨兩大核心城市——金邊與吳哥窟。全程入住精選柬式五星級酒店，享受舒適旅程。', '台灣', '台北', '柬埔寨', '金邊, 吳哥窟', 5, 33900, true, 'https://travel.liontravel.com/detail?NormGroupID=972eecc0-3da1-4b60-bb1e-f600b5d6dc78', 1);
